context_text: <A> he wanted to come back and live with me and die you know he said he wanted to come back home / <B> exactly / <A> and ah so of course i carry a lot of guilt i would have i you know if i had the opportunity to to go back into time and change anything { you } / <B> [ mhm ] / <A> know it would be that / <B> right / <A> you know i would not have um kicked him out um things would have been different if i knew that four months down the line he was going to not be here anymore well my goodness you know that's how { i would } / <B> [ right ] / <A> have switched it you know if i am it's something that i really do wish i could do { go back } / <B> [ right ]
